Key finding: Exercise Longevity (24/25, 45.3M community) and Sleep/Circadian (23/25, 40.9M) represent the largest communities in this cohort — but the highest WTP signal is in Longevity Biotech Investing (25/25, 19.9M) and mTOR Pathways (25/25, 32.9M) where learning directly serves financial decision-making. The geroscience space has a UNIQUE dynamic: users are not just intellectually curious — they believe this knowledge adds years to their life. This emotional urgency (existential motivation) produces the highest subscription retention of any app category. Compare: Duolingo retains because of streaks; longevity apps retain because users believe canceling = epistemic risk to their lifespan. Zero true competitors in this space despite 'Outlive' selling 1M+ copies (demand signal with zero app-format supply response).
